channel.title: Mortality on Nature Works
channel.description: Recent content in Mortality on Nature Works

item.title: Future Forest Gardens
item.description:
The Future Generations Act in Wales is a groundbreaking piece of legislation, may we should all have gardens for future generations?

The Well-being of Future Generations Act 2015 “gives us the ambition, permission and legal obligation to improve our social, cultural, environmental and economic well-being”. http://localhost:1313/blog/230311-future-forest-gardens/
